text:
ご苦労様。
まずは最初の特訓をクリアと
いったところね。

まだまだ序の口。
入り口のようなものだから
調子に乗らないように。

それじゃ、また次の
特訓で

Nice work. That's the first boot camp done
and dusted.

This is just the beginning, of course.
Don't get ahead of yourself when your foot's
barely in the door.

Well, I'll see you at the next boot camp.
Until then...
